movie.synopsis: Panda Plan: The Magical Tribe (2026) Panda Plan The Magical Tribe (2026) The panda “Huhu” is about to move into a brand new panda enclosure when he’s suddenly confronted by international robbers. Huhu falls off a cliff while battling the robbers, only to awaken to discover he’s in a mysterious tribe. To return to the enclosure, this intriguing team helps the tribe solve various problems…
